comments.author: corone
comments.body_markdown:
並列稼働のためのagent構築…✍️

--
Boris Pattern (Claude Code全体適用)
Thinking: Opus 4.5
Working: Sonnet 4.5 (via Task)
Review: Opus 4.5
Key: Delegate work to separate workers, never do all in one Task
Moon's Role (Advisor, NOT Orchestrator)
Analyzes if tasks are parallelizable
Returns recommended execution plan
Does NOT execute tasks (Claude Code does with background:true)
Does NOT manage queue or collect results
Critical: Context Isolation (思考の混在防止)
Each Task is independent instance
Unique output paths per ticket
Task ID tracking for results
No shared state between workers

https://x.com/seiseiuchi2/status/2015596470322462730?s=20
